Bring your own gas

any supported asset

Efficient Trading

Split your trades

No trade is too large for Hydration. Our user-friendly trading app will help you minimize slippage by allowing you to easily split your order in several consecutive trades.

Swap your favorite assets

Hydration combines several types of trading AMMs to offer the best execution for your swaps: Omnipool, Stablepools and Isolated Pools. Jump into an ocean of interconnected liquidity with lower slippage and fewer hops.

Automate your trades

Gain exposure to assets over time by automating your trades using our on-chain DCA. Place DCA orders like a pro with a few clicks: Just set your budget and the time period over which the order should be executed.

Trade over-the-counter

Trade any asset over-the-counter without trusted third parties or slippage. Place an OTC order and let others fill.

Liquidity Incentives

Hydrate Your Summer with up to 260% APR

Start earning rewards by providing liquidity for one of the many incentivized assets on Hydration. The design of the Omnipool supports single-sided LPing. Start earning rewards after providing just a single asset.

Lending & Borrowing

Borrow a multitude of digital assets after providing collateral in one or several accepted currencies.

HOLLAR

The future deserves the HOLLAR - a decentralized, over-collateralized digital currency designed to be price-stable.

Referrals

Refer traders and earn rewards

Hydration is to be shared. Invite users and start accumulating referral rewards generated by their future trades. The more volume you help onboard, the higher rewards you will be earning.

Built to be Unstoppable

Hydration is a fully decentralized Protocol run by on-chain governance

On-Chain Governance

Decisions for the Hydration Protocol are democratically made through transparent processes with broad community involvement.

Powered by HDX Token

HDX is Hydration's native token, granting governance access. It also incentivizes beneficial actions by redistributing Hydration's revenue streams.

Incentivizing Participation with Staking

Hydration incentivizes governance participation with staking rewards. Users can stake their HDX and use it to vote in referenda.

Protocol Owned Liquidity

Liquidity is foundational to Hydration. The Protocol disposes over a large Treasury which is continuously diversified through on-chain governance.

On-Chain Governance

Decisions for the Hydration Protocol are democratically made through transparent processes with broad community involvement.

Powered by HDX Token

HDX is Hydration's native token, granting governance access. It also incentivizes beneficial actions by redistributing Hydration's revenue streams.

Incentivizing Participation with Staking

Hydration incentivizes governance participation with staking rewards. Users can stake their HDX and use it to vote in referenda.

Protocol Owned Liquidity

Liquidity is foundational to Hydration. The Protocol disposes over a large Treasury which is continuously diversified through on-chain governance.

Empowering DAOs

15+ projects and DAOs manage their liquidity using Hydration, including the Treasury of Polkadot.

Accessible market making

Hydration provides a cost-efficient, permissionless platform for market making any asset, without hidden costs or listing fees. DAOs can register their token and create an Isolated Pool, making their token tradable against all other assets on Hydration.

Single-sided LPing

The Hydration Omnipool allows single-sided LPing, enabling DAOs to add assets to the AMM without needing a second asset. Unlike Isolated Pools, listings in the Omnipool are permissioned and governed by the Hydration Protocol's guidelines.

Treasury diversification

DAOs can build up Protocol Owned Liquidity and diversify their Treasury holdings using one of the Hydration AMMs or by placing an OTC order. They can also schedule an on-chain DCA order, allowing them to accumulate assets gradually over time.

Price discovery and initial token distribution

DAOs in their early stages can start a Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) to distribute their tokens without the risk of sniping bots and to navigate initial price discovery.

Supporting decentralization

All DAOs running on the Polkadot network can manage their Treasuries on Hydration in a fully decentralized and non-custodial manner, using the Governance of their chain and cross-chain communication (XCM). No multisigs required.

Developers and Security

Help build the
future of finance

Hydration provides the liquidity layer which empowers developers to build the financial apps of tomorrow.

Hydration security

Find and report vulnerabilities, receive generous rewards.

SDK for frontend applications

Utilize our SDK to streamline frontend development and enhance user experiences.

Github

Explore our open-source repository for collaborative development and access to essential resources.

Developer docs

Access comprehensive documentation for seamless integration and optimization of our APIs.
